metadata.title: International Tour Packages
metadata.description: International tour packages with licensed hunting and survival challenges. Book online with secure payment.

home.toursDescription: Curated international journeys. Book online, travel with confidence.
home.agencyTitle: A tour agency with something extra.
home.agencyDescription: {siteName} is built around international tour packages — plus licensed hunting expeditions and survival challenges for travelers who want more than a standard trip.
home.pillarsSubtitle: Core tours for everyone — plus two signature experiences for those who want more.
home.pillarToursDesc: Nature, culture, and adventure packages worldwide — our main catalog.
home.pillarHuntingDesc: Licensed expeditions with outfitters, permits, and lodge stays.
home.pillarSurvivalDesc: Professional wilderness training — bushcraft, navigation, rescue skills.

tours.description: Our core offering — curated international tour packages for nature, culture, and adventure.
tours.forWho: Best for travelers who want guided journeys with strong logistics, local hosts, and a clear itinerary — from easy scenic circuits to moderate multi-day treks.
tours.emptyDescription: New tour packages will appear here soon.

hunting.description: Licensed hunting expeditions with professional outfitters, permits, and lodge stays.
hunting.forWho: For licensed hunters seeking organized international hunts with professional guides, clear permit support, and lodge-based logistics.
hunting.emptyDescription: New hunting expeditions will appear here soon.

survival.description: Professional wilderness survival programs — bushcraft, navigation, and emergency protocols.
survival.forWho: For adventurers who want real skills training — not a gimmick. Progressive courses led by certified instructors in Arctic, jungle, alpine, and desert environments.
survival.emptyDescription: New survival challenges will appear here soon.

about.title: About
about.heroDescription: An international tour agency — with hunting and survival challenges as our signature edge.
about.p1: {siteName} is primarily a tour package agency. We design and book international journeys — nature expeditions, cultural trips, and adventure travel worldwide.
about.p2: What sets us apart are two signature experiences: licensed hunting expeditions and professional survival challenges. They are the twist on top of a full-service tour operation.
about.pillarToursBody: Curated packages across continents — trekking, culture, nature, and soft adventure with vetted local partners.
about.pillarHuntingBody: Estate and free-range hunts with professional outfitters, permit support, and lodge accommodation.
about.pillarSurvivalBody: Structured wilderness training programs that teach real bushcraft, navigation, and emergency skills.
about.bookingBody: Choose a package, submit your details, and pay a secure deposit online via PayPal (card or PayPal balance). You receive instant confirmation and a PDF receipt. Remaining balance is due before departure per package terms.

booking.title: Book This Expedition
booking.requestsPlaceholder: Dietary needs, experience level, equipment requests...

payment.title: Complete Your Payment
payment.cancelled: Payment cancelled. You can try again below.
payment.failedDesc: Please try again or use a different payment method.
payment.paypalDesc: Pay with PayPal or bank card. Funds go to the merchant business account.
payment.rampexDesc: Secure hosted checkout — Visa, Mastercard and more. Instant confirmation via webhook.
payment.rampexNote: You will be redirected to Rampex checkout to complete payment securely.
payment.rampexReturnPending: If you already paid, confirmation may take a few seconds. Refresh this page or check your email.
payment.payCard: Pay with Debit or Credit Card — {amount}
payment.cardSectionTitle: Pay with Visa, Mastercard, or other card (PayPal)
payment.cardSectionDesc: No PayPal account needed — enter your card details right here on this page.
payment.paypalSectionTitle: Or pay with your PayPal account
payment.cardFormLoading: Card form is still loading. Please wait a few seconds.
payment.cardFormInvalid: Please fill in all card fields correctly.
payment.cardError: PayPal error. Check your card and try again.
payment.sandboxCardTitle: Sandbox test — pay with card here, no PayPal login
payment.redirectNote: You will be redirected to paypal.com to complete payment securely.

footer.tagline: International tours · licensed hunting · survival challenges. Book online with secure PayPal deposit.
footer.checkout: Secure PayPal checkout · Instant PDF receipts

confirmation.confirmedDesc: Thank you, {name}. Your deposit has been received and your expedition is reserved.
confirmation.emailNote: A confirmation has been recorded for {email}. Remaining balance due before departure per booking terms.
